_comment: This is the authoritative shape of a single game room's state. The SERVER owns and mutates this. Clients only ever receive broadcasts of (a full or partial) version of this and render it. Never trust client-submitted state.

players.name: string
properties: array of tileId strings owned by this player

turnOrder: array of player ids, fixed order
turn.phase: awaiting_roll | moving | resolving_tile | awaiting_buy_decision | in_auction | awaiting_trade_response | awaiting_jail_decision | turn_end

board._comment: Static reference data, loaded once, not part of mutable game state, but every tile's CURRENT ownership lives in tiles below

tiles.type: property | transport_hub | utility | chance | community_chest | tax | go | jail | free_parking | go_to_jail
tiles.name: string (display name, e.g. 'Lagos Island')
tiles.group: string (color group id, e.g. 'blue', 'red', for monopoly-set bonus rent)

pendingAction._comment: Whatever the engine is currently waiting on. Only one of these is active at a time. This is the key field that drives whose turn/decision it is, beyond just whose turn it is.
pendingAction.type: null | buy_decision | auction | trade_offer | jail_decision | bankruptcy_resolution

data._comment_trade_offer: { fromPlayerId, toPlayerId, offer: { cash, propertyIds[], getOutOfJailCards }, request: { cash, propertyIds[], getOutOfJailCards }, status: pending|accepted|rejected }

log.type: roll | move | buy | rent_paid | auction_won | trade_completed | mortgage | bankruptcy | jail | game_end
log.message: string (human-readable, e.g. 'Chidi rolled a 7 and moved to Abuja')

settings.freeParkingJackpot: boolean (house rule toggle, off by default)
